books.title: Reading Lessons: Level 1 (Revised 2025)
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: This program features 15-minute lessons focusing on phonics and high-frequency word recognition and utilizing classic stories and poems from the Free and Treadwell Readers. The lessons include spelling, copywork, dictation, and some grammar. This program reflects Mason's principles as well as recent research, especially the importance of phonological awareness and phonics.

books.title: Reading-Literature: The Primer
books.author: Free and Treadwell
books.rationale: This is a great collection of folk tales and poems for a beginning reader. This book series lends itself well to Mason's approach to teaching children to read because of the repetitive pattern of the stories and the decodable text. Use with our Reading Lessons: Level 1.

books.title: Italics: Beautiful Handwriting for Children
books.author: Penny Gardner
books.rationale: We like this model because it is lovely, yet simple. Both the print and cursive models are in italic, making this a solid foundation for fine lettering later. Some may prefer a more traditional cursive model.

books.title: Getty-Dubay® Italic Handwriting Book B
books.author: Handwriting Success
books.rationale: For the beginning reader, this book presents lowercase, capitals and numerals. With a short word and lively sentence on each page, this book engages the student.

books.title: Reading-Literature: First Reader
books.author: Free and Treadwell
books.rationale: This is a great collection of folk tales and poems for a beginning reader. This book series lends itself well to Mason's approach to teaching children to read because of the repetitive pattern of the stories and the decodable text. Use with our Reading Lessons: Level 2.

books.title: Getty-Dubay® Italic Handwriting Book C
books.author: Handwriting Success
books.rationale: The simple transition to cursive italic is introduced. Basic writing practice themes include: modes of transportation (automobile through zeppelin), days of the week, months of the year, and sentences. Capitals practice: cities of the USA. Includes numerals.

books.title: Reading-Literature: Second Reader
books.author: Free and Treadwell
books.rationale: This is a great collection of folk tales and poems for a beginning reader. This book series lends itself well to Mason's approach to teaching children to read because of the repetitive pattern of the stories and the decodable text. Use with our Reading Lessons: Level 3.

books.title: Reading Lessons: Level 3
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: This program features 15-minute lessons focusing on phonics and high-frequency word recognition and utilizing classic stories and poems from the Free and Treadwell Readers. The lessons include spelling, copywork, dictation, and some grammar. This program reflects Mason's principles as well as recent research, especially the importance of phonological awareness and phonics.

books.title: Getty-Dubay® Italic Handwriting Book D
books.author: Handwriting Success
books.rationale: Writing practice for basic italic and cursive italic includes capitalization, vowel and consonant sounds, prefixes, suffixes, phonograms, homophones, tongue twisters, and six poem forms. Cursive capitals are introduced with historical development of each letter.

books.title: Italics: Beautiful Handwriting for Children
books.author: Penny Gardner
books.rationale: We like this model because it is lovely, yet simple. Both the print and cursive models are in italic, making this a solid foundation for fine lettering later. Some may prefer a more traditional cursive model.

books.title: Grammar Island
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: This program brings story, delight, and ideas to the study of grammar. Grammar Island introduces, in a simple fashion, the full four-level grammar analysis of (1) parts of speech, (2) parts of the sentence, (3) phrases, and (4) clauses.

books.title: Practice Island
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: Practice Island is a workbook with practice sentences that is used in conjunction with Grammar Island.

books.title: Grade 4 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Italics: Beautiful Handwriting for Children
books.author: Penny Gardner
books.rationale: We like this model because it is lovely, yet simple. Both the print and cursive models are in italic, making this a solid foundation for fine lettering later. Some may prefer a more traditional cursive model.

books.title: Getty-Dubay® Italic Handwriting Book E
books.author: Handwriting Success
books.rationale: While practicing cursive italic, students explore the many facets of the world of science — the animal kingdom, DNA, photosynthesis, minerals, continents, biomes, our solar system, and galaxy. Practice with capitals: cities of the world and history of letters.

books.title: Grade 4 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Practice Island
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: Practice Island is a workbook with practice sentences that is used in conjunction with Grammar Island.

books.title: Sentence Island
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: This program brings story, delight, and ideas to the study of grammar. In this book, students focus on the science and art of forming a good sentence and learn the rules and concepts that are essential for formal writing.

books.title: Grade 5 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Getty-Dubay® Italic Handwriting Book F
books.author: Handwriting Success
books.rationale: Figures of speech in the English language are used for cursive writing practice. Students will practice capital letters using the names of First Nation tribes and communities of North America. The exercises also explore the history of letters and numerals.

books.title: Grade 5 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Grammar Town
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: Grammar Town builds on the foundation presented in Grammar Island and continues to bring delight and interest to the study of writing and grammar. It continues the full four-level grammar analysis of (1) parts of speech, (2) parts of the sentence, (3) phrases, and (4) clauses.

books.title: Practice Town
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: This workbook accompanies Grammar Town and contains practice sentences.

books.title: Grade 6 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.rationale: We like this model because it is lovely, yet simple. Both the print and cursive models are in italic, making this a solid foundation for fine lettering later. Some may prefer a more traditional cursive model.

books.title: Getty-Dubay® Italic Handwriting Book G
books.author: Handwriting Success
books.rationale: The final book in the Series contains basic and cursive writing practice to acquaint the student with the history of writing.  Part 3: edged pen writing.

books.title: Grade 6 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Paragraph Town
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: This program brings story, delight, and ideas to the study of grammar. Paragraph Town gives children an entertaining and comprehensive introduction to the paragraph. With a narrative background, students explore the importance of organizing sentences into clear, orderly paragraphs with dialogue, description, comparison, punctuation, and grammar, as well as a look at the significance of the sounds of language. Structured exercises and assignments allow students to practice integrating these ideas into their writing.

books.title: Practice Town
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: This workbook accompanies Grammar Town and contains practice sentences.

books.title: Grade 7 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Grade 7 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Grammar Voyage
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: Building on grammar concepts introduced in Grammar Island and Grammar Town, this book continues to help students explore the intricacies of grammar.

books.title: Practice Voyage
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: This workbook accompanies Grammar Voyage and contains practice sentences.

books.title: Grade 8 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Grade 8 Copywork & Dictation Book
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: Copywork and dictation passages taken from the books and poems from this year.

books.title: Essay Voyage
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: The author's passion for writing comes through as he explains the ideas behind good essay writing.

books.title: Caesar's English II
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: Studies in Latin stems, alongside typical classical and academic vocabulary words, will aid students in using, spelling and understanding these words in context.

books.title: Bryson's Dictionary of Troublesome Words: A Writer's Guide to Getting It Right
books.author: Bill Bryson
books.rationale: A helpful resource for avoiding error and increasing clarity in composition.

books.title: Style: The Basics of Clarity & Grace 5th ed.
books.author: Joseph Williams, Joseph Bizup
books.rationale: This classic work covers elemental principles of writing that will help students diagnose the strengths and weaknesses of their prose quickly and revise effectively. The text is written in a conversational style, offering reason-based principles for clear writing.

books.title: Steering the Craft: A Twenty-First Century Guide to Sailing the Sea of Story
books.author: Ursula Le Guin
books.rationale: A master writer gives an interesting overview of narrative techniques and other writing principles to help students write effectively and pay attention more closely to the books they are reading.

books.title: Advanced Academic Writing II Teacher Manual
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: Advanced Academic Writing II helps students learn the basics of source integration, literary analysis, academic style, and the writing process. Only the teacher manual is required, as it includes the full text of the student book plus special boxes that contain extra tips and questions that students and instructors will reference.

books.title: Communicating with Grace and Virtue: Learning to Listen, Speak, Text, and Interact as a Christian
books.author: Quentin Schultze
books.rationale: An engaging and practical guide to help Christians interact effectively.

books.title: The Craft of Research
books.author: Wayne C. Booth
books.rationale: A practical guide to research and more advanced writing.

books.title: Caring for Words in a Culture of Lies (2nd ed.)
books.author: Marilyn McEntyre
books.rationale: Thoughtful and relevant ideas on writing for today's students.

books.title: Advanced Academic Writing II Teacher Manual
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: Advanced Academic Writing II helps students learn the basics of source integration, literary analysis, academic style, and the writing process. Only the teacher manual is required, as it includes the full text of the student book plus special boxes that contain extra tips and questions that students and instructors will reference.

books.title: Our Work: Grades 1-2
books.author: Alveary
books.rationale: This is a compilation of the year's Recitation, Picture Study, Hymns, Spirituals, and Folk Songs. Line drawings of artifacts from the historical time period are also included to provide students with inspiration for their Book of Centuries. We recommend printing or purchasing a copy for each student.
